content: Cognee self-hosted env vars: LLM_PROVIDER=openai, LLM_MODEL=openai/gpt-4o-mini, LLM_API_KEY=sk-..., LLM_TEMPERATURE=0.0. VECTOR_DB_PROVIDER=lancedb (default, no extra service). GRAPH_DATABASE_PROVIDER=ladybug (default, file-based). DB_PROVIDER=sqlite (default). SYSTEM_ROOT_DIRECTORY=.cognee_system (graph+vector stores). DATA_ROOT_DIRECTORY=.data_storage (source files). For PatchPilot: set SYSTEM_ROOT_DIRECTORY=.patchpilot_memory/system, DATA_ROOT_DIRECTORY=.patchpilot_memory/data. All defaults work for local/self-hosted — no Postgres or Neo4j needed. EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=openai, EMBEDDING_MODEL=openai/text-embedding-3-large. Deploy warning: these dirs live on local FS; ephemeral deploy targets (Render free tier) will reset on redeploy — must attach persistent disk.
